_comment: Hand-built sample in LongMemEval's instance schema (question / answer / question_type / haystack_sessions = list of sessions, each a list of {role, content} turns). This is a SYNTHETIC sample to prove the adapter end-to-end without the multi-hundred-MB real download; run the real benchmark with `--dataset path/to/longmemeval_*.json`. Covers single-session, multi-session, knowledge-update, and preference types.

instances.question: Which city did I move to for my new job?

haystack_sessions.content: I just accepted a new job and moved to Portland last month.
Congratulations on the new role and the move!
Thanks, settling in has been busy.
The rain here takes some getting used to.
The Pacific Northwest is known for it.
I adopted a dog over the weekend and named him Rex.
That's wonderful — welcome to the family, Rex!
Quick errand: I need to buy more printer paper for the office.
Noted.
Rex had his first vet checkup today; the vet confirmed he's a healthy beagle.
Glad the beagle is doing well!

instances.question: When is my flight currently scheduled?

haystack_sessions.content: I booked my flight home for June 5.
Got it, June 5.
The conference agenda looks packed this year.
Sounds like a busy week.
Update: my flight got moved — it's now on June 12 instead of the 5th.
Understood, June 12 it is.

instances.question: What dietary restriction should a host keep in mind for me?

haystack_sessions.content: By the way, I've been vegetarian for about five years now.
Good to know — I'll keep that in mind.
I'm thinking of hosting a dinner party next month.
